# Goldman Automation

Goldman Automation is a London-based automation studio founded by Adrian Goldman, a former construction company owner who now builds practical AI systems for small service businesses.

## What it does

Goldman Automation builds done-for-you AI automation for London trades (builders, electricians, plumbers, roofers) and clinics/beauty studios (salons, aesthetic clinics, physios, dentists). The focus is on three problems that cost service businesses the most money:

1. **Missed enquiries** — missed calls get an instant SMS text-back; every lead is captured, scored and followed up automatically.
2. **No-shows** — automated reminders and deposit capture cut empty slots.
3. **Admin overhead** — digital forms, consents, client records and rebooking nudges run without manual effort.

## Live products

- **LeadAgentAI** — AI lead capture and qualification for trades. Catches emails, web forms and missed calls; scores each lead 1–10 on budget, scope and timeline; reads uploaded plans and photos; filters spam; sends 48-hour and 7-day follow-ups automatically. 73% automated enquiry response rate.

- **Scure** — Full booking and client management system for beauty studios and clinics. Bilingual (English/Polish) AI receptionist available 24/7; confirmation, reminder and review sequences; digital consultation forms and consents; before/after photo storage; owner dashboard. Deployed at a North London beauty studio with 21 five-star Google reviews.

## Packages

- Trades package: from £495 setup + £299/month
- Beauty & clinic package: from £750 setup + £297/month
- Bespoke automation: from £1,500
